text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Tamamo Cross feeling down lately, the two
of us pay a visit to the shrine.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
O heavenly ones, sorry for only askin' ya for stuff
when times are tough! But the tough times just
keep on comin', and I don't know what to do!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm beggin' ya! I just wanna feel better!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello there, Tamtam. What a surprise it is to
see you here of all places.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Well, my luck's been in the gutter lately. Kinda
feels like I got a curse hangin' over me or
somethin'. So I came to see if the gods could do
somethin' about it.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear... Well in that case, let me pray along
with you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Please... take my luck and give it all to Tamtam!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I don't care what happens to me. Just grant her
happiness, I beg of you!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That prayer was way over the top!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, whoopsy-daisy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But I really do hope you get better.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Thanks for the well wishes. And thanks for
prayin' with me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hm? What the?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, my. What's wrong, Tamtam?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I entered one of those online hashtag
sweepstakes, and somehow I won free tickets to
an amusement park!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I never thought I'd actually win one of those
things, but I guess someone's gotta!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I bet this is all thanks to you prayin' with me,
Creek! Oh, the squirts back home are gonna freak
when I tell 'em about this!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
How lovely! By the way, would you mind if I tag
along to that amusement park with you?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're more than welcome! This is gonna be a ton of fun for sure!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I can't wait to see your adorable little
siblings! I'm going to spoil them silly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't say for sure whether this shrine visit is to
thank for it, but Tamamo Cross starts to feel
much better.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: All right, I'm gonna head back to the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Urgh! I stepped in some gum!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear. We'd better get that cleaned up right
away.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Gum comes right off once it's cooled, and I've got
a cooling mist spray right here, so allow me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Sorry about this, Creek. I'll return the
favor, promise...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to apologize, Tamtam. I'm just
happy that you feel you can depend on me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I guess ya gotta do this prayin' stuff pretty
regularly, or the gods won't help ya out...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Cheer up! Even if another bout of bad luck comes
your way, I'll be sure to do something about it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after Super Creek's act of kindness, Tamamo
Cross remains under the weather.
